### install foundry-rs/forge-std
```shell
$ forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit --no-git
```
### install openzeppelin-contracts
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts  --no-git
```

### install openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable  --no-git
```

### deploy 
```shell
$ forge script script/Deploy.s.sol -vvv --rpc-url=https://bsc.blockrazor.xyz --broadcast --private-key=[privateKey]
```


### build router constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(address,address,address,address)" 0xDc2cEdb481c18d9bE48ecC9118f64B85F1c539A4  0x3E03ad2f51d5D0584B835Ab4069C77f1d882DF34 0xda6E96c707c703F556081d2F2C99AE434aEE7C46 0x33197a1d84Ec164413853B227174166c71475Db4
```
### verify router contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x5c51bd302F867e80A50340F5DA74F39537ea6996 src/Router.sol:Router  --constructor-args 0x000000000000000000000000dc2cedb481c18d9be48ecc9118f64b85f1c539a40000000000000000000000003e03ad2f51d5d0584b835ab4069c77f1d882df34000000000000000000000000da6e96c707c703f556081d2f2c99ae434aee7c4600000000000000000000000033197a1d84ec164413853b227174166c71475db4 --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build lex constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEX" "LEX" 0x4F4c3f7d9E089d039a06672715621cC5C35510B1 0x0f8503562A8e5B33030117492994D324f31F0e5B 0x33197a1d84Ec164413853B227174166c71475Db4
```

### verify lex contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0xbE0b36cA2bCc6DEb811B1F6F634d650cB3EB428E src/token/Lex.sol:Lex  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build leo constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEO" "LEO" 0x4F4c3f7d9E089d039a06672715621cC5C35510B1 0x0f8503562A8e5B33030117492994D324f31F0e5B 0x33197a1d84Ec164413853B227174166c71475Db4

```

### verify leo contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x5a2Cd7311dAD231c7fb62c632176388724Ea6742 src/token/Leo.sol:Leo  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```



### 调整如下：
1. 全局排队订单，然后这里筛选一下
2. 订单熔断状态判断
3. 动态收益剩余打给指定地址
4. 100U的额度每个人都给体验一下
5. 排队订单序号当前到了10号，用户个人中心能看见自己的排队订单的序号11
6. 倒计时排查
7. 增加一个全网如今最高限额
8. 取消排队订单没有扣除2U
9. 赎回手续费、收益领取1，5%、没有分完的动态分成三个地址
